programme.desc: Griffin takes on the wings of death and talks about everything from his burgeoning stand-up comedy career to that time he dunked over a Kia Optima.

programme.sub-title: Daniel Radcliffe Catches a Head Rush While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Daniel Radcliffe is known the world over for his role as Harry Potter. But how is he with spicy food? Find out as the multifaceted actor takes on the wings of death and accidentally double-dabs Da Bomb.

programme.desc: Zoe Saldaña is an actor who lays claim to some of the biggest box-office franchises of our time, from "Avatar" to "Guardians of the Galaxy."

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Kid Cudi Goes to the Moon While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Kid Cudi is a Grammy Award-winning artist and multi-hyphenate entertainer. He takes on the wings of death while discussing his brand-new album and animated TV special of the same name.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Austin Butler Searches for Comfort While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Austin Butler is a Golden Globe Award-winning actor who is up for an Oscar in this year's Best Actor category for his performance in "Elvis," the acclaimed biopic directed by Baz Luhrmann.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Andy Cohen Spills the Tea While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Can his experience with combustible "Real Housewives" reunions and Lady Gaga pee-perfume hijinks prepare Andy Cohen for the likes of Zombie Apocalypse and Mad Dog 357?

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Date Movie
programme.desc: A spoof of romantic comedies which focuses on a man, his crush, his parents, and her father.

programme.title: A Christmas Comeback
programme.desc: A mother-daughter singing duo are given the opportunity to create a new album for Christmas but must overcome their differences before their music careers are over for good.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien's long-lost daughter is discovered and Sharon and Tracey want to arrange a meeting.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey is nominated to take over as Pearly Queen. Dorien reluctantly agrees to a family reunion.

programme.title: Lily Phillips: Crying
programme.desc: "Fresh" from hatching a baby girl and a sold-out Edinburgh run, '...uninhibited feminist with a foul mouth' **** (Daily Express), Lily Phillips, as seen on ITV, BBC, Comedy Central and E4, is back with a new hour… and she and her perinium are fine!

programme.title: Party Down
programme.desc: Kyle Bradway has landed his star-making role. He hires Party Down to cater his party, leading to welcome reunions and some unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Teacher Is Secretly A Pop Star
programme.desc: Audrey, a tomboy drummer, faces a prejudiced music teacher and unsupportive mom. But when her teacher reveals her true identity as a famous pop star and her own journey of overcoming judgment, Audrey gains the confidence to shine.

programme.title: Birthday Party Changes Girl's Life Forever
programme.desc: Envious magician Marvin sabotages rival Princess Wanda's party, only to find himself unexpectedly filling in as her unicorn sidekick. Their accidental collaboration leads to unforeseen success, forcing them to embrace teamwork and a new magical partnership.

programme.title: Scrawny Teen Becomes Popular
programme.desc: Benji, a bullied teen, learns martial arts for self-defense. He uses his skills in an underground fight club for money, but guided by his master's wisdom, he chooses to fight for justice, helping his mom and a neighbor escape abusive situations.

programme.title: Kid Builds Secret Nightclub
programme.desc: Suspended Jay turns his hospital detention into a secret nightclub for patients, bringing joy and healing through dance. But when his mom discovers the party, Jay faces a new, unexpected "punishment" – serving his own party.

programme.title: Life Changed With One Viral Video
programme.desc: Young Jordan faces bullies and an absent, addicted father, finding solace in his grandfather's photography. Years later, a struggling Jordan, with a baby on the way, rediscovers his passion for photography, eventually building a YouTube empire centered on his family.

programme.title: Twin Sisters Reunite After 18 Years
programme.desc: Rose and Lilly, identical twins separated at birth, swap lives. Rose, seeking wealth, experiences luxury's emptiness, while Lilly, craving connection, finds warmth in simplicity. Their switch reveals their true desires, reunites them with their parents, and mends broken relationships.

programme.title: Teen Builds Home Out Of Toys
programme.desc: Cody, is belittled by his family for his passion for Legos. programme.title: I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: S1:E15 The Turtle Room - Dan took all the doors off the cupboards, sanded them, and then put some finish on them and voilà: they looked terrible. So, he didn't put them up. Now, his cupboards have no doors, his kitchen a disaster, and when you look into the opening between the kitchen and living rooms you see turtles.

programme.title: I Wrecked My House

programme.title: Tori & Dean: Cabin Fever

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we talk to Kieran Proverbs-Brown, who became a gang member at 14 and was in prison at 18 for attempted murder. When he got out at 30, he made a firm decision to turn his life around.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Patrick Foster's gambling addiction had catastrophic consequences on his career and family life. Here, he tells us about his internal battle with addiction, the millions he's placed in bets, and the vast sums of debt that he racked up as a result.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: United States Senator Bernie Sanders shares his fears surrounding Donald Trump's re-election in 2024, and why this may signal the end of global democracy as we know it. He offers his vision for an ideal future amidst pressing global challenges.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: English physicist Professor Brian Cox explains to us what would happen if you jumped into a black hole, his favourite planet in the universe and how the Earth will be destroyed (don't worry, this won't happen for about 5 billion years).

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former police officer James Bannon describes spending two years undercover infiltrating the infamous hooligans of the London-based football team Millwall, known as the Bushwackers, during the height of football violence in England in the late 1980s.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Love Island's Doctor Alex George came down to LADbible studios to discuss reality TV, his mental health journey, and fighting COVID on the frontline of the NHS. Alex bravely opens up about the death of his brother Llyr and how the loss impacted him.

programme.title: The Eleven

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: President of the World
programme.desc: What if Matchroom's Eddie Hearn ran the planet? From banning rude people to bringing dogs into the office and selling out stadiums like Wembley and MSG, the boxing boss lays down the law in his wild fantasy presidency.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Austin Butler and Zoë Kravitz face off in a hilarious UK vs US Snack Wars, putting their taste buds to the test with sour Warheads, traditional black pudding, and a nostalgic childhood British favourite — cucumber sandwiches. In this episode of Snack Wars, Conan Gray decides who has the best snacks: UK & Ireland or USA. Conan teaches us how to make a Nutterbutter and Oreo combo, cries at the sight of carrot cake, and pours the perfect Guinness. But which country will win?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Wonka actors Timothée Chalamet and Keegan-Michael Key debate who's hotter: Timothée Chalamet or Tom Holland? Would every film be made better with a Muppets remake? And even pitch their own Muppets version of Dune and Call Me By Your Name!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this hilarious episode, Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson and Kevin Hart do amazing impressions of each other, Dwayne reveals a naughty secret about Kevin and we find out their thoughts on The Rock becoming US president!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Niall Horan compares Irish and British snacks and has an incredible time pouring the PERFECT pint of Guinness and recounts a hilarious story involving Lewis Capaldi and Buckfast!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Zoe Saldaña tackle some of our audience's biggest debates by arguing whether Janice from Friends was as annoying as we all thought and whether you should grab dinner on a first date.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: In this episode of Snack Wars, Måneskin frontman Damiano David dives fork-first into a head-to-head battle of Italian vs UK snacks and the results might surprise you. He even reveals his bad boy food habits… let's just say chocolate is his weakness. In this episode, David Corenswet gets his first ever taste of a Greggs sausage roll, while Nicholas Hoult tries to convince him that British chocolate deserves more respect, and the two debate which country's fake cheese is more questionable.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Steve Carell joins us for a hilarious game of Snack Wars: UK v USA, and has a great time comparing snacks from across the pond. He tries Jelly Tots for the first time and finds out what pork scratchings are made from. Sabrina Carpenter reveals she's never eaten a McDonald's, has a hilarious reaction to Whisky and just can't handle the sour taste of Toxic Waste while putting UK and US snacks to the test!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: The Grand Tour's Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May pit British delicacies against food from around the world, necking Japanese sake and devouring British pork pies. They even attempt to eat a Chinese century egg!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Agree to Disagree: Episode 44

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A school project opens a door to Georgie's past that could ultimately change her life at Heartland. Meanwhile, Casey expresses interest in buying one of Ty and Caleb's bulldogging horses and Caleb enlists Amy's help to train it in order to secure the deal. Then, while celebrating their first big sale, Ty tells Caleb that he wants to officially pull out of their business partnership, which results in Caleb forging an unlikely alliance. And Tim is forced to come clean about his senior rodeo circuit dreams when he learns that Casey is buying him a bulldogging horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When a threat of a cull looms over a herd of wild horses, Jack and Amy go to the aid of an old friend in Pike River. Amy finds herself contending with a flood of bittersweet memories, but she seizes the opportunity to get back to her roots and reclaim what she has lost. Then, when Tim tricks Ty into accompanying him on a trip it has an unexpected result when Ty recognizes what it is he really wants. Meanwhile, Lou and Peter find themselves at loggerheads when Peter arrives late for a staycation with Georgie and Katie at the Dude Ranch. The tension between them rises until they are confronted with an outside threat that could destroy the family unit.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: With the fate of the wild horses hanging in the balance, Amy and Ty find themselves drawing closer as they make a desperate bid to save them. Meanwhile, Lou and Peter set aside their differences and form a united front against trumped up child endangerment charges. And Georgie is shattered when someone from her past threatens her future at Heartland.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy finds herself in a difficult position when a client reveals that Peter turned down a lucrative job offer in Calgary. Meanwhile, with increasing demands on her time and two horses to care for, Georgie struggles to accept a friend's help with Phoenix. Then, when Ty receives an unexpected windfall he discovers that Caleb took Jesse up on his offer, and forged a partnership with him. And when a disagreement sends Jack back to Heartland early from his overnighter with Lisa, Lou struggles to accept their chosen form of communication: not talking.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy is invited to do a horse clinic in Montana, she and Ty decide to take a road trip together, but an unexpected encounter derails their plans. Meanwhile, back at Heartland, Jack and Lisa feel caught in the middle when Lou confronts Peter over his lie of omission, and his decision to choose his career in Vancouver over a job offer in Calgary which would give him a chance to spend more time with his family. And with both Ty and Scott out of town, Georgie and Jade volunteer at the vet clinic.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy struggles to help a Hutterite family whose team of Percherons ran amok during a hayride. But Georgie forms a strong bond with the young Hutterite daughter who turns out to be the key to unraveling the mystery. While Tim admittedly had a fantastic time traveling the rodeo circuit with Casey, he returns to Heartland and begins to second-guess their burgeoning relationship. Meanwhile, back at the clinic, a significant vet victory for Ty proves to be a bittersweet triumph when he realizes that all he wants to do – is share the experience with Amy. And Jack is forced to confront his traditional ideals when Lisa informs him that she has no intention of taking his name.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A school project opens a door to Georgie's past that could ultimately change her life at Heartland. Meanwhile, Casey expresses interest in buying one of Ty and Caleb's bulldogging horses and Caleb enlists Amy's help to train it in order to secure the deal. Then, while celebrating their first big sale, Ty tells Caleb that he wants to officially pull out of their business partnership, which results in Caleb forging an unlikely alliance. Amy finds herself contending with a flood of bittersweet memories, but she seizes the opportunity to get back to her roots and reclaim what she has lost. Then, when Tim tricks Ty into accompanying him on a trip it has an unexpected result when Ty recognizes what it is he really wants. Meanwhile, Lou and Peter find themselves at loggerheads when Peter arrives late for a staycation with Georgie and Katie at the Dude Ranch. The tension between them rises until they are confronted with an outside threat that could destroy the family unit.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E15
programme.desc: Seven year old Tommy, who lives in an orphanage, is happy to spend Christmas with Gladys and Abner Kravitz. Six year old Michael, also an orphan, derides Tommy's belief is Santa Claus. When Samantha and Darrin bring him home for the holidays, their efforts to get Michael to share in the festivities of the season fail. After Michael admits he would believe in Santa Claus if he really existed, Samantha takes Michael and Darrin on her broomstick to the North Pole, where Michael meets Santa Claus. Later, back at home Darrin and Michael awake. Although both feel they have dreamed the trip, Michael now believes in Santa Claus. Gladys overhears Michael tell Tommy he has met Santa Claus. When she tries to pin Tommy down, he denies that Michael had ever mentioned it. Mrs. Grange, the director of the orphanage, comes to the Stephens home with George and Sarah Johnson. At the Kravitz home, both Gladys and Abner, who are about to return Tommy to the orphanage, express their wish to have someone like Tommy permanently. When Michael leaves with Mr. and Mrs. Johnson, Samantha and Darrin know Michael has found two loving parents.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E16
programme.desc: The members of the Hospital Fund Auxiliary appoint Samantha Entertainment Chairman for the group's bazaar. Limited to spending fifty dollars, Samantha hires Zeno, a broken down magician who has taken to drink. Because of this, his assistant, Roxie Ames, has left the act. Using her gift of magic, Samantha makes Zeno the hit of the show. As a result, Zeno gets a job on TV. Zeno pleads with Samantha to help him. Assisted by Samantha, Zeno runs through a very successful rehearsal. Just before the show goes on the air, Roxie appears and injects herself into the act. Hogging the show, Roxie kills Zeno' s act and his con-fidence. She admits she returned just to get a regular spot on TV herself. Samantha turns Roxie into a comic prop for Zeno. After Zeno's successful performance, Darrin tells Samantha that his client has booked Zeno for the next thirteen weeks. Darrin attempts some magic on his own. When he succeeds, he is not certain whether his skill or Samantha's is responsible.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E17
programme.desc: Darrin sprains his ankle and is confined to bed with his foot in a cast. Wearying of running up and down stairs on errands for Darrin, Samantha suggests he use her power of witchcraft during the emergency. Endora warns Samantha that she is making a mistake. After his initial wishes are granted, Darrin, as Endora had predicted, becomes drunk with power. After showering Samantha with gifts, Darrin not only decides to use his power to get a larger home, but also tells Larry Tate, his boss, that he is retiring so that he and Samantha can take a trip around the world. Samantha's initial plan to stop Darrin by showering him with new luxuries fails. Then Darrin gives Samantha flowers and a wristwatch he has purchased with his own money. From Samantha's happy reaction, Darrin realizes these gifts mean more to her than all the others. Samantha happily agrees to his request that she take back his powers of witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E18
programme.desc: After arranging to meet Samantha to celebrate their six month anniversary, Darrin arrives at his office to meet Margaret Marshall, chairman of the board of a cosmetics firm. Margaret, a stunning woman in her late thirties, successful both with men and in business, insists that Darrin fly to Chicago that night to complete the quarter million dollar campaign he had planned for her company. Fumbling out of the anniversary arrangements with Samantha, Darrin flies to Chicago and meets Margaret, who has become quite interested in him, aboard her yacht. There, Darrin sees a cat and feels it may be Samantha, egged on by her mother, Endora, to fly to Chicago to check on his activities. While Darrin evades Margaret's advances, a pelican arrives on the scene. Although both Margaret and Captain Kelly feel there is something strange in Darrin's reactions to the animals, Margaret, realizing Darrin is truly in love with his wife, ac-cepts his advertising campaign. Greeted by Samantha at home, Darrin is reassured that the cat he has brought with him is not his wife. However, when the pelican arrives, Darrin is uncertain whether it might not be Endora.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E19
programme.desc: After Endora promises to curb her witchery for the even-ing, Samantha arranges a dinner for Darrin's parents and her mother to meet. Darrin is fearful of the results. Father Stephens has just retired and feels lost and insecure. Endora, being utterly charming, as she has promised Samantha, plays up to Father. Father once more feels life is worth living, but Mother Stephens becomes jealous. Before Mother is through, she is sure Endora wants to take Father from her. She asks Darrin for the name of a divorce lawyer. Darrin and Samantha work feverishly to save the marriage. Despite their efforts, Mother takes a train to Arizona and Father boards a plane on the first step of a world trip. Samantha asks Endora's help. Using her witchcraft, Endora brings both plane and train to Angel Falls, where Father had proposed to Mother years before. In the romantic setting, both realize they are much younger than they thought.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E20
programme.desc: When Darrin refuses to allow Samantha to act as matron of honor at cousin's wedding in Egypt, Endora tells him he's in trouble. Immediately Darrin starts having problems with his campaign to get the Woolfe Brothers Department Store account. despite Darrin's protests, Larry Tate gives him an assistant. The assistant, young Gideon Whitsett, soon maneuvers himself into being regarded as a brilliant young man. On the make, Gideon soon has Woolfe looking to him for ideas, which he has stolen from Darrin. Darrin is sure that Gideon is a warlock whom Endora has assigned to take his job. When everything else fails, Samantha decides to stop Gideon herself. Using witchcraft, Samantha gets Gideon to reveal the ruthless maneuvers he has been using to get Darrin's job. Darrin, who overhears the conversation, finally realizes Gideon is not a warlock. A right to the jaw puts Gideon out of action. His confidence restored, Darrin sells Mr. Woolfe on his idea for a successful campaign.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E21
programme.desc: Darrin's agency is unable to find a model for the "Jewel of the East" campaign. Darrin hopes they'll be able to do so, if only to bolster the confidence of Wally Ames, who is sub-stituting for the company's top photographer. Samantha trans-forms the Stephens' cat into a beautiful Oriental girl named Ling Ling. Everyone flips over her and the campaign is wrapped up. Darrin invites Larry and Louise Tate and Wally to a victory celebration at his home. Wally, intrigued by Ling Ling's feline grace, brings her along. Samantha's efforts to make Ling Ling give up Wally fail. To avoid a catastrophe, Samantha is forced to tell Darrin and asks him to warn Wally off, but Wally only becomes angry with Darrin. Samantha spikes Ling Ling's drink with truth serum. Wally bows out when Ling Ling displays her true cat nature. Later, Gladys Kravitz calls her husband when she sees Ling Ling clad in a mink coat, lapping milk from a saucer. By the time Abner gets to the window, Samantha has returned Ling Ling to her original state, and Abner gives his wife a spoonful of her nerve medicine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E22
programme.desc: Endora, hoping to break up her daughter's marriage, superimposes Samantha's face on a print entitled "Maid of Salem:" the print is dated 1690. Darrin buys the print and then begins to worry about the difference between Samantha's age and his own. With Endora planting seeds of doubt at every turn, Darrin visualizes himself as a doddering old man, while Samantha retains her youthful appearance. Everyone, including Larry Tate and the doctor from whom Darrin seeks advice, fails to realize what is troubling him. Then, in a nearby park, Darrin overhears two squirrels to which Endora has given voice talk about their dif-ferences in age. Endora finally admits to Samantha that she can age along with Darrin. Samantha, after telling Darrin she never posed for the picture, tells him that her mother is to blame for their problem. She assures him that they will grow old together, but being in love will never note the difference. As insurance, Samantha uses witchcraft to make the "Maid of Salem" disappear.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E23
programme.desc: The lack of a traffic signal at busy Morning Glory Circle makes it virtually impossible for the Stephens or their neighbors to cross without risking life and limb. Joe Harvey calls a meeting at his home to discuss plans for doing something about it. Darrin makes an ad for a mass rally at the school auditorium to force City Hall to put a traffic light on the corner. However, Samantha has trouble getting Endora to return the traffic signals she has collected. Endora even brings a London bobby to the Stephens' living room. The bobby, of course, has disappeared by the time Gladys Kravitz brings her husband to see him. At the rally, the Mayor tells his constituents a traffic light is unnecessary. However, using her witchcraft, Samantha has the Mayor and his limousine so tied up in a traffic jam that he is convinced a traffic signal is necessary. Endora, as a final touch, brings a modern traffic signal to the Stephens home for the victory celebration. Gladys sees it, but by the time she brings Abner, Samantha makes Endora cause it to vanish.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E24
programme.desc: Samantha tells Endora she doesn't have time for a dress-fitting. Endora solves Samantha's problem by transforming herself into En-Sam, identical to Samantha. Bob Frazer, an author, falls for En-Sam and they do the town together. Meanwhile, Darrin tells Samantha to expect a visit from his friend, Bob Frazer. Gladys Kravitz, who has seen En-Sam with Bob, is sure the Stephens home is about to break up. After Bob sees Samantha and mistakes her for En-Sam, Samantha explains to Endora the trouble she is causing. Endora is convinced when she learns Bob is expected at the Stephens home. All of En-Sam's efforts to break with Bob fail. Bob is determined to have a showdown with Darrin over Samantha. Samantha tells Darrin that Bob has fallen in love with Endora. Endora, still En-Sam, arrives and Bob thinks En-Sam and Samantha are identical twins. Although Endora promises to give Bob Up, Samantha, knowing her mother, is not sure what she will do.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E25
programme.desc: Samantha and Gladys Kravitz become aware of their husbands' interest in Priscilla "Pleasure" O'Riley, a beautiful model, when she buys a house next door. Pleasure is hiding from Thor "Thunderbolt" Swenson, an offensive fullback who has threatened mayhem if he sees her with another man. Darrin becomes involved in Pleasure's affairs after he helps her move in. One night, Pleasure wakes up the Stephens. Telling them that Thunderbolt has learned her new address, she pleads for Darrin's protection. Thunderbolt arrives and Samantha inadvertently gives him the impression that Darrin is Pleasure's new boyfriend. Darrin is saved from Thunderbolt's wrath when Samantha turns him into the image of his grandmother. Then, certain that Abner is the man, Thunderbolt knocks him out and is arrested. Gladys hits the headlines when the newspapers mistakenly single her out as the object of Thunderbolt's jealousy. Pleasure's lawyer gets a court order to keep Thunderbolt away. However, Pleasure accepts Thunderbolt's offer to drive her to the Mayor's office where she is to pose as "Miss Urban Renewal."

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E26
programme.sub-title: Driving Is The Only Way To Fly
programme.desc: After a violent argument while he is teaching her to drive, Darrin enrolls Samantha in a driving school. Basil Koenig assigns his brother-in-law Harold, one of humanity's leading nervous wrecks, to teach Samantha. Time after time, Samantha uses witchcraft to get the dual-controlled car out of catastrophic predicaments. Harold finally breaks when he hears Endora's voice from the back seat and is unable to see her. Harold leaves Samantha, Endora, and the car and heads for a psychiatrist. Feeling responsible, Samantha takes Darrin to the school to keep Harold from losing his job. Matters get more complicated when Darrin tries to explain Endora's unseen presence. Although Koenig has already fired Harold, he rehires him when Samantha threatens to go to another driving school. After Darrin learns Samantha has cured Harold's nervousness by getting him to join a class in basket weaving, Darrin decides to join, too.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E11
programme.sub-title: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: When Darrin starts searching for a "Miss Jasmine" for his firm's perfume account, Endora seizes the opportunity to sew doubt in Samantha's mind about her husband's loyalty. The search for a beautiful model ends when Jannine Fleur arrives. Both Larry and Darrin agree that Jannine is "Miss Jasmine." Samantha learns that Jannine is a witch whom Endora has asked to captivate Darrin. Samantha warns Jannine to keel away from Darrin. Jannine, intrigued, keeps on with her original assign-ment. Darrin uses Larry Tate as his chaperone to keep him from becoming involved with Jannine. Darrin and Larry go to Jannine's apartment to discuss details of the "Miss Jasmine" campaign. Jannine doctors the drinks. Larry falls asleep and Darrin becomes amorous. Just as Darrin starts to kiss Jannine, Samantha uses her witchcraft, and Darrin appears to Jannine as a large ugly fish. When the campaign is completed, Samantha turns the picture of "Miss Jasmine" into a caricature of Jannine.

programme.title: Moksha
programme.desc: Appalled at the manner lawyers treat less affluent people, Vikram Saigal decides to do something for the poor, who have a legal cause of action, but are unable to afford a lawyer. He discusses this with his girlfriend, Rithika Sanyal, and together they come up with several ideas to raise money to create an organization to help the poor get legal aid at no or reasonable cost. When this plan fails, Vikram decides to rob a bank, but Rithika does not support him, and they split up. And then Rithika is killed and the police charge Vikram with her murder, relying on considerable evidence and witnesses that will go to show that Vikram did indeed commit this crime.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.1
programme.desc: Eun-ho is a fourteen-year announcer who has remained unknown, while Hyun-oh is the star announcer of PPS. They dated passionately at work for eight years before breaking up. Three years later, the two have become sworn enemies who growl at each other whenever they meet at the station.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.2

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.3

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.4

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.5
programme.desc: After blacking out from her panic attack, Eun-ho wakes up at home. Hyun-oh is quietly sitting beside her, watching over her. His gentle care reminds her of the days when they were madly in love, which feels unfamiliar yet comforting.

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.6
programme.desc: On the outside, Hyun-oh seems to have grown up in a warm and wealthy family, but he carries a secret pain he has never shared, not even with Eun-ho. He chose to break up with her because he could not bear to share his unhappiness with the woman he loved.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Grumman Avenger, which was the most important carrier-based torpedo bomber on American and British carriers throughout the Second World War. They were also the biggest and heaviest carrier aircraft of the conflict.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Republic P-47 Thunderbolt, a Second World War fighter aircraft produced by the American company Republic Aviation from 1941 until 1945. It was considered a successful high-altitude fighter and also served as the foremost US fighter-bomber in the ground-attack role.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Yakovlev Yak-3, a Second World War Soviet fighter that was regarded for its performance at low altitudes and its agility. It was one of the most successful Soviet aircraft designs of the war.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Hawker Hurricane was the first RAF aircraft to fly over 300mph. Over half of every enemy aeroplane destroyed in the Battle of Britain was by a Hurricane, not a Spitfire.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II. Regarded as one of the most important aircraft of the Cold War. It was a major part of the United States Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps, and was also used by many other countries.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft

programme.title: Signs of Evil
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS, Hitler's Schutzstaffel, stands for terror and the murder of millions. The penniless graphic artist Walter Heck was given the job of designing the jagged, rune-like characters in 1929. The “sig” rune was rooted deep in the ideological cosmos of the Nazis and their supporters. They saw themselves as the descendants of the Teutons and declared the runes to be humanity's original Germanic script. The symbol was meant to unite Heinrich Himmler's “Black Order.” But did it escape their notice that it was originally of Semitic origin? In October 1945, the Allies passed a law banning the Nazi Party and all associated organizations, including the SS. The young Federal Republic even forbade all Nazi symbols. This documentary tells the gripping story of the SS symbol, from the Middle Ages to the present day.

programme.title: Up in Flames 1936-1940
programme.desc: At the end of 1939, the German Army has invaded Poland. They are followed closely by the SS (Schutzstaffel) task forces, which have only one mission: To murder the Polish intelligence.

programme.title: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Hitler invaded the Soviet Union. In the shadow of the war, Nazi regime gradually advances its "final solution to the Jewish problem".

programme.title: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Treblinka, Belzec Majdanek and Sobibor - the camps of "Operation Reinhardt," a Nazi murder campaign that took nearly two million lives within a few months in 1942/43.

programme.title: Armageddon 1943-1945
programme.desc: After the defeat of Stalingrad, the Nazis plan a kind of extended suicide on a global scale. Denunciations from the population ensure that the Gestapo can suppress almost any resistance.

programme.title: The Reckoning 1945-1948
programme.desc: After the war, winners and survivors want to hold the Germans responsible. The reckoning with National Socialism is ambivalent.

programme.title: The Limes, Season 1
programme.desc: The Limes, Season 1 - Fortification against the Barbarians: Warships secured the river borders formed by the Rhine and the Danube. The palisades, walls, trenches and forts of the Limes on land stretched across Germania, the wild "Barbaricum." The Limes was a bulwark that ran from northern Britain all the way to the Black Sea.

programme.desc: The U.S. and NASA have set their sights on manned missions to Mars. Can they “sail” into the unknown and navigate the dangerous seas of deep space?

programme.title: Mars: Adapt or Leave
programme.desc: As the ExoMars rover continues to explore, Mars gives up her secrets. Getting to Mars is one thing staying is another. Can we really land humans on the red planet?

programme.title: Emissaries
programme.desc: It is nearly 150 million km, or 1 Astronomical Unit (AU), from the Sun to the Earth. Humans can't travel that far, but robots and probes can—with astounding results.

programme.title: Danger Asteroids Ahead
programme.desc: Space exploration is expensive, but one program is essential: the Planetary Defense Program, which locates and deflects the 15,000 wayward asteroids close to Earth.

programme.title: First Light
programme.desc: The latest version of the once-humble telescope is going farther than ever before—carrying us closer to the first light that ever bathed our universe.

programme.title: Alien Planets
programme.desc: NASA's next-generation space telescope TESS (Exoplanet Survey Satellite) has begun its search for Earth-like planets belonging to other star systems.

programme.title: The Fleece Inn, West Yorkshire
programme.desc: Yvette and team face violent poltergeist activity at The Fleece Inn, one of England's most haunted.

programme.title: Haden Hill House
programme.desc: Most Haunted's Sandwell investigation intensifies as ghostly inhabitants appear to stalk the team.

programme.title: Hereford Shire Hall & Ruthin Castle
programme.desc: Yvette and Glen explore Ruthin Castle Karl and Stuart investigate ghosts at Hereford Town Hall.

programme.title: 30 East Drive
programme.desc: Most Haunted visits 30 East Drive, home to a violent poltergeist in Pontefract, Yorkshire.

programme.title: 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team begins a tense night investigating 30 East Drive's eerie activity.

programme.title: Armley Mills Museum
programme.desc: Most Haunted investigates Armley Mills in Leeds, seeking ghosts in the former world's largest wool mill.

programme.title: Carr House
programme.desc: Most Haunted probes Carr House, chasing tales of a Grey Lady and headless Jester in Kirklees estate.

programme.title: Hill House
programme.desc: Most Haunted probes a Sandbach care home with dark figures, swinging lights, and ghostly children.

programme.title: Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: TAPS travels to “Christmas City” to investigate hauntings believed to be caused by two kids trapped in time.

programme.title: Roller Ghoster
programme.desc: TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, an amusement park that sits on the site of an awful accident.

programme.title: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel. This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Flooded Souls
programme.desc: TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam built on Native American land.

programme.title: Dead & Breakfast
programme.desc: TAPS investigates a 19th century Bed and Breakfast in Red Boiling Springs, Tennessee.

programme.title: Moonshine & Madness
programme.desc: Slavery, murder and madness are behind the hauntings at the notorious Graham Mansion.

programme.title: City Hell
programme.desc: TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is haunting the building.

programme.title: Frighternity
programme.desc: TAPS heads to the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Pregnant woolly monkey Piquita looks fit to burst, capuchin Sean, over from Chile, is keen to prove that nobody can groom quite like he can, and life hangs in the balance for Blue the ruffed lemur.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Baby woolly monkey Paulo is tempted outside by some delicious bugs, while onions are used to encourage natural behaviour amongst the capuchins. The team also has a radical plan for the third meeting between youngster Ben and alpha male Hananya.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There is a scuffle between the female capuchins, Tia needs surgery, and orang-utan Amy is heavily pregnant - and very grumpy. Meanwhile, there is something new in the play area of the chimp nursery, and Alison has her last visit with Paulo.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Ben has a nasty infection and animal director Jeremy is worried it may lead to him losing his foot. Elsewhere, golden-cheeked gibbon Tien has undergone a transformation, and keeper Holly checks up on Xuzy.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Ben's mysterious infection has spread to some of the others in his group, and it's a race against time to diagnose and treat it effectively. Meanwhile, the orang-utans are watching their weight, but are not so keen to get onto the scales.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Ben's foot infection has led to the amputation of one of his toes. Just as he's improving, Honey, one of the chimps in Hananya's house, is struck down by the mysterious bacterial infection - and it is serious.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Mueller's gibbons Adidas and Dalumie head for the treetops for the first time, while Peanut, Pung-Yo and Tien move into the enclosure next door. Plus, a specialist doctor is called in when Freddy's bowel complaint fails to improve.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison Cronin travels to Monkey World's new endangered primate sanctuary in Vietnam, and meets the newest resident of the centre, Ellie the young golden-cheeked gibbon. Two rare monkeys are being kept in a theme park outside Ho Chi Minh City.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Jonathan is over groomed and has gone bald, while Tom, one of the alpha male capuchins, has died. Elsewhere, the chimps are given walnuts and Jestah gets more than his fair share.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Disturbing footage convinces Alison to rescue an adult female chimpanzee working in the tourist industry in Mexico, who urgently needs the team's help. The nursery chimps have a play session.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy are tasked with rescuing feisty capuchin monkeys from Spain at the sanctuary, keeper Mike watches over a baby woolly monkey, the newest arrival at the park.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy arrive home with two new capuchin monkeys from Spain, but one of them makes a bid for freedom. Something is wrong with one of Britain's best known chimps, Trudy. Debbie's capuchin group takes on a snack that bites back.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The chimps show off their football skills while the staff head to a neglected farm.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigate released documents regarding alien and UFO encounters, made accessible to the public in 2011 by the Freedom of Information Act. We investigate mass UFO sightings, personal abductions, government cover-ups and breaking alien news from around the world. We delve into the "photoshopping" of space, the value of Wikileaks, and the role social media plays in alien stories.

programme.title: S1 E12 Hawaii
programme.desc: The Hawaiian Islands are the most remote island chain on the planet.

programme.title: S2 E10 Mt. St. Helens

programme.title: Nature's Most Dangerous
programme.desc: Who's not a thrill seeker among us? We humans love to put ourselves at risk and lap up the thrill of living dangerously. And to fuel our fetish for fear, we turn to the animal kingdom. But what is the truth behind the killers of the natural world? Do they live up to their reputations, and who really is the most dangerous? From killer crocs to ferocious big cats, we'll run you through the most dangerous teeth, fangs, stingers and bites in the animal kingdom. These are the deadliest animals on planet earth.

programme.title: Brown Bears Teddy Bears Picnic
programme.desc: If you go down to the woods today a wonderful treat awaits! The home of one of the planet's most loved and characterful animals – the brown bear. Baby bears have a lot to learn about life in the forest, but thankfully all bears know their way around a good picnic.

programme.title: Cheetah: Beating the Odds
programme.desc: A cheetah raises her young family on the vast expanse of the Serengeti. If her cubs are going to survive, she'll have to overcome a barrage of challenges. Lions, gangsters of the plains, are quick to throw their muscle around, whilst hyenas and jackals attempt to steal anything the cheetah manage to kill. The cheetah will have to learn the hunting skills their mother has perfected. Once they've learnt the ropes, they'll make their own way across the plains, establishing territory and having cubs of their own.

programme.title: Mega Nature
programme.desc: The largest animals are some of the most awe-inspiring, but when smaller species come together their combined forces can be even greater.

programme.title: Mountains
programme.desc: Mountains define some of our most spectacular landscapes, creating a mosaic of dramatic habitats, teaming with incredible wildlife. Mountains are found on every continent on Earth, covering 22% of the planet's surface. They're a vital part of our ecosystem a quarter of terrestrial animal and plant species live in mountains and they house an incredible 85% of all amphibians, mammals and birds. It's no wonder that so many cultures consider mountains sacred places: gateways to the heavens.

programme.title: Hidden Germany
programme.desc: A dramatic country steeped in history and ancient culture, it's easy to focus on Germany's great cities and landmarks. But Germany also has a more hidden treasure-trove, one full of natural wonders

programme.title: Nature's Most Dangerous
programme.desc: Who's not a thrill seeker among us? We humans love to put ourselves at risk and lap up the thrill of living dangerously. And to fuel our fetish for fear, we turn to the animal kingdom. But what is the truth behind the killers of the natural world? Do they live up to their reputations, and who really is the most dangerous? From killer crocs to ferocious big cats, we'll run you through the most dangerous teeth, fangs, stingers and bites in the animal kingdom. These are the deadliest animals on planet earth.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: The journey up the coast continues through Delaware to suburban New Jersey, and onwards into the heart of Manhattan. In Delaware, famous as a corporate tax haven, we visit a winery. In New York City we zip around with a bicycle courier and then head out to Long Island for oysters.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: Nowhere is the American way of life as relaxed as on Florida's beaches. The Keys, a chain of islands at the far southern end of the state, reveal a more laid-back side of the USA. But all of Florida amazes -- with secluded beaches, unspoiled nature, and the legacy of the early European settlers.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: From New York, the journey up the coast leads into the heart of New England. We visit Yale spend some time in the 19th century mansions at Newport, RI tour the coastal fishing and vacation towns of Massachusetts, and then meet a modern entrepreneur in Boston and see her rooftop gardens.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: New Hampshire has only 19 kilometers of coastline and short summers, all the more reason Shauna Fraser takes every opportunity to be by the sea. In the sheltered harbor of Rye, Shauna also targets inner attitude with yoga on a paddleboard.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: We travel from Georgia through the Carolinas to Virginia, ending near Washington, DC. Along the way we meet a Georgia farmer talk to painter J. Chris Wilson in Charleston sail along the Outer Banks of Carolina, and visit rural Virginia, experiencing life in the beautiful southern states.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The palm tree laden beaches on Mexico's Riviera Maya on the Yucatan peninsula are endless, and the turquoise sea with its gentle Caribbean surf is a warm 25 degrees during the mild winter in this part of the world. Between Cancún and Punta Allen, where once there was little more than bushland and a few sleepy fishing villages, vibrant life has evolved during the past three decades. Richard Sowa has lived on a floating island for the past 15 years: an island he built himself out of empty plastic bottles. The bon vivant him-self sees it as a "solution for our planet's refuse problem". Off Punta Allen, a village in the bay of Sian Ka'an, Mexican Mara Coral Ley and her cousin Kim, continue to catch lobsters by adhering to the traditional method and were awarded an "Eco seal for sustainable fishing" for their trouble. It is silent under water off Isla Mujeres and it is here that the artist Jason deCaires has constructed a sculpture park. Hundreds of lifesize figures form an artificial reef at a depth of 12 metres. Fish and plants complete his work of art. The master himself is convinced: "Mother Nature is the true artist".

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The island of Martinique is a piece of France in the Caribbean, between Florida and South America. And of course, Savoir-vivre applies just as it does on the other side of the Atlantic, between the English Channel and the Mediterranean. Jacky Pascault is the first and only man to cultivate mushrooms in the Caribbean. Everywhere else, they grow on artificially fertilised soil, but Jacky's Champignons Tropicaux flourish on sugar cane fibres. Nicole Vilo tailors hats and dresses out of coconut palms. Of course, the catwalk for the models wearing her first collection is one of the countless dream beaches. The Martiniquais sail on boats they call Yole, which have no keel and are therefore difficult to navigate. The crew members hang over the water in breakneck fashion on long wooden poles. Just the job for Yole-boss Max' "problem kids": they not only learn complicated handling, but also team spirit.

programme.desc: We find out more about the animals that have their feet firmly planted on or under the ground. And find out how their senses are tuned to survive. What we see above the ground is only a small part of the natural world.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates,warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this last episode of Super Senses we take the grand final tour to see the greatest of all the special weapons that help some animals to govern the wilderness. In this episode we see it, hear it, touch it, smell it and taste it like animals do.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Mother Nature along the Mother Road. Check out these can't miss natural wonders on Route 66.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family checks out Birmingham, Alabama, ground zero of the Civil Rights Movement, visiting museums, monuments, and locations that helped end segregation in the United States.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family ventures to the Big Easy, soaking up the culture of New Orleans with jazz, beignets, airboat adventures, and more.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family road trips to the Grand Canyon and Zion National Park in search of some outdoor fun.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family explores Washington D.C., discovering monuments, Ford's Theatre, and the best cupcakes in the capital!

programme.title: Lucky in Love
programme.desc: Danny and Mara try their luck in the Flip Side of Florida, Jacksonville.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Just Landed
programme.desc: Jim lands in Maine to meet the faces behind one of the top seafood scenes in the U.S. From Portland to North Haven, it's all about experiencing true coastal life from the Mainers' point of view. Jim then checks off a bucket list moment: smallmouth fishing on the legendary Grand Lake.

programme.title: COFFEE The Ultimate Language
programme.desc: Rogers, Arkansas, is a vibrant city where rich history, and a thriving arts scene converge. ​In this episode Andrea Allen, US Barista Champion, Visits 2 woman owned shops roasting and serving Rogers in a big way.

programme.title: The Main Event
programme.desc: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America's oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.

programme.title: Cheat Meal
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica head to Galveston, Texas, to create a fiery feast for Concetta, the spice-obsessed owner of Maceo Spice & Import Co. From the coastal vibes at Vida Agave to island-famous eats at The Spot, savory classics at Mario's Seawall, local favorites at Mosquito Cafe, and indulgent sweets from Pattycakes Bakery, they turn up the heat to craft a cheat meal packed with bold flavors and Galveston flair.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: America's Musical Journey
programme.desc: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: The Black Sea of ​​Ukraine is diverse: swampy landscape in the Danube Delta, beach and party life around Odessa and lonely islands and huge salt lakes in the east. As different as the landscapes are the people - Old Believers who live as they did 300 years ago, young women who can be brokered through marriage agencies into a new life and children who learn German today to later connect to Western Europe.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: Russia's sunny south, a journey from the Taman peninsula to Sochi, the most famous seaside resort on the Russian Black Sea coast. Cliffs, endless beaches, Mediterranean climate - the Russian Riviera can compete with the French Riviera. The largest sparkling wine cellar in Russia, the world's northernmost tea plantation - a historic coastline with many discoveries.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: Green oases on the Black Sea, mountain chains on the coast and a dazzling metropolis. Georgia is unique. The country has only 3.7 million inhabitants. But they have traditions and customs that are not found anywhere else in the world. We show family celebrations, brave cable car guides and dancing triplets.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: As wild and unpredictable as the Black Sea are the people who live on its coast - at least that is what they say in Turkey. In the fifth part of our journey, we meet young female footballers, passionate musicians in small fishing villages and up-and-coming cities and accompany a pilot through the difficult ship passage on the Bosporus to the Black Sea. In addition, the fertile coast lures with many discoveries: fishing is only one pillar of economic prosperity. In the mountainous hinterland you'll find tea, hazelnuts and tobacco.

programme.title: Street of Gongs
programme.desc: In Thailand's rural northeast you will find the street of Gongs. Outside the provincial capital of Ubon Ratchatani in Thailand's rural northeast, a country road nearly thirty kilometers long stretches to the banks of the Mekong River. Even from a distance, you can hear what is being made there: gongs of all sizes in nearly 50 manufactories. The gong is considered the ancient instrument and symbol of Asia. It occupies an important cultural significance, initiates rituals, expels demons, gives strength and courage. This film visits the creators of these unique instruments - a family business that has been laboriously handcrafting gongs for generations. They have a big mission: The abbot of the temple has ordered a new, large gong for the upcoming festival. Will they be able to finish it in time?

programme.title: Norway for Pilgrims
programme.desc: The route is 400 miles long, starts in Oslo and heads north to Trondheim.

programme.title: Bali Spirit
programme.desc: We visit Bali during the Bali Spirit Festival, which is one of the largest yoga gatherings in the world.

programme.title: Running the World
programme.desc: A challenge to race each other and a labyrinth of narrow streets and hidden passages to navigate will make this one of the trickiest challenges.

programme.title: Running the World

programme.title: Car & Country Quest
programme.desc: Ashique leads an adventure through North Kerala, driving Ferraris and Lamborghinis, as well as experiencing a fascinating train ride across the Indian region. The trio enjoys wildlife, a market visit, a mountain camping trip, a night safari, traditional dance, and a thrilling race.

programme.title: Car & Country Quest
programme.desc: The trio experience gladiator combat, drive classic cars through the countryside, and learn winemaking in Barolo. The adventure also includes motocross thrills, blending history, culture, and excitement throughout northern Italy.

programme.title: Car & Country Quest
programme.desc: Ashique surprises the team with Vespa rides along the coast, adapts plans with an aquarium visit, and arranges a Fiat 500 countryside drive. The day ends with relaxation at a Roman spa.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: This time urban explorers Josh and Cody separately visit Germany and Morocco in search of astonishing abandoned locations including Wünsdorf, the forbidden city near Berlin, and an abandoned filmset in the Sahara desert used for Game of Thrones.

programme.title: Marketplace Middle East
programme.desc: With nearly five billion passengers expected in 2025, global aviation is entering a high-growth phase, pushing major hubs to innovate through AI, automation, and new infrastructure to handle record demand. Also, at the Dubai Airshow, we track how industry giants are shaping the next era of commercial flight amid rising profits and shifting global routes.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: Despite poor road infrastructure, massive traffic congestion, water transportation across the abundant waterways of Lagos, Nigeria is still underutilized. Now, renewed push to develop the region's waterways has seen a growth in passenger ferrires as well as a partnership with the international boat racing franchise E1. E1 is also looking to grow their presence on the continent through digital education and outreach. We take a look at the challenges and opportunities of tapping into the region's blue economy Aspen Global CEO Samer Kassem sits down to discuss the biopharmaceutical giant's growth and why he believes it's Africa's time to shine on a global stage when it comes to business.

Flamin' Hot Lemon With his smooth and gentle voice, Jaehyun brings a unique color to NCT's music. 「J」 is his very first solo album, where he took part in writing, composing, and shaping the overall direction, including the album title. Just as he often marks his belongings with the initial “J,” this album also reflects what is most true to him, which is why he named it 「J」. 4. Dandelion 1. Smoke

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album. NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.” Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style. The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released. Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles,

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album. NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.” Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky and Tyra love to play together! However, sometimes Tyra cannot keep up with her younger brother's imagination.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky dreamed of learning to ride a two-wheeled bike! He wanted to roam all over DinoCity with his friend Boo and hear the wind whistle past his ears!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: The Saur family is off to the amusement park! Everyone's looking forward to a fun day out, only Tyra is preoccupied by something.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Out on the football field one day, Ricky managed to score a goal... with his tail! The supporters went wild. Everyone praised and congratulated Ricky.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky only has to step outside the house and he ends up in a puddle or something equally unpleasant. This time, he's come home dirty with a bump on his forehead and his clothes all torn.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Everyone knows Kraken - he's Ricky and Tyra's pet. Everyone knows that Ricky often comes up with ideas - each more promising than the last! This time, Ricky has decided to train Kraken!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Birthdays are the absolute best. There's no doubt about it: you get gifts, all your wishes are granted, and you even get free ice cream.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Today's an important day! The Saur family is going to get their Christmas tree.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: When you have a sibling, you have to share literally everything! For in a family, almost everything is shared -toys, sweets, and even a pet!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Cousin Sara comes to visit the Saur family. She's travelled half the world and Ricky and Tyra worry that she'll find Dinocity boring.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: At school, the dinosaurs get a homework assignment-to make a presentation about Dinocity. One student decides to present about the town's architecture, and another about its main attractions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play 'Boo', but stop to watch Ned help his dad plant and water some geraniums. In Teletubbyland, nine pretty flowers and a watering can appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love playing on the slide. They stop to watch Andy Brown and some children digging in the sand for crabs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Matthew and James help their uncle milk the cows. In Teletubbyland, the Tubby Custard machine isn't working, so they sing a special 'Tubby Custard' song. Then, the Tubby Custard machine works again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies dance, before watching two girls do some Flamenco dancing with their teacher. It's time for the Teletubbies to wash their feet. They love using their Tubby Sponges.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy says "Eh-oh" and runs off to find the other Tubbies. They watch some children make fantastic animals from papermache.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky says "Eh-oh". The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be the Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty hat. The Teletubbies are very happy when they find their favourite things to play with.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po fetches the other to watch Andy Brown and two children look for some rabbits. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky is looking for Po. He looks for her everywhere, but she is hiding from him. When he finds her all the Tubbies dance a happy dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run to see Debbie and the children singing songs. A voice trumpet appears and plays a game with Po and Tinky Winky. It's called "Two Little Teletubbies Sitting On A Hill".

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Ginger Snap's No-Light Night of Fright
programme.desc: Strawberry & Friends go on an overnight campout, Ginger Snap doesn't want them to find out, she's afraid of the dark!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's friend Coco Calypso lives on Seaberry Beach with her pet, Papaya Parrot, and a band of fun-loving monkeys.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure. A disappointed Honey proves to be a very impatient patient, that is until Strawberry Shortcake and her friends work together telling stories and...

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz wants to exclude a new girl, Blueberry Muffin, because she's "different" - in the way she looks, lives, talks, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Conniving Peppermint Fizz talks the other kids into a competition to see whose pet is best. Peppermint cheats so that her pet, Cola Chameleon, wins best pet. But she is surprised when the other kids don't care who won.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry gets an unsettling message from her friend Caramel Corn, who owns a quaint little farm out in the Strawberryland countryside. Things aren't going so well for Caramel Corn: her farm animals seem to be running away.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. A trip to the North Pole and a visit with Santa make this adventure truly wonderful, until a pile of melting snowballs turns Strawberry's carefully selected presents into a soggy mess. It all ends well, though, when Strawberry's friends remind her that the best gift of all is the gift of friendship.

programme.desc: As the spies apprehend a ridiculous scorpion villain, Trent accidentally stumbles upon them and witnesses the spies in action!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies investigate the bizarre things that are happening to the natural wonders of the world. They soon discover that a man with a strange, high-tech device is to blame.

programme.title: Totally Spies

programme.title: Totally Spies
