programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: The Surge
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd. Nowhere is safe but fortunately, the Ninja have been given the powerful Techno Blades. But the only problem is that they have no idea how to use them. Time has passed since the Ultimate Battle, and while the Golden Ninja continues to watch over Ninjago, the other Ninja have become complacent as schoolteachers. When a mysterious invitation from genius Cyrus Borg brings them to the futuristic New Ninjago City, trouble surges when a digital virus of the Overlord takes over technology. The Golden Ninja makes a heroic entrance, only to find out his Golden Power supercharges the enemy. Sensei Wu stays behind so that the Ninja can escape with the only thing that can save Ninjago's future – Borg's Techno Weapons.

programme.title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord's evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go. Their only chance is to learn the secrets of the Techno blades and use them to cut all power to save Ninjao from this technological menace. The Ninja hide out at a safe place void of technology – Sensei Garmadon's Sanctuary. That night, Zane is visited by Borg's female robo-assistant, Pixal. She warns them that the Digital Overlord is after Lloyd's Golden Power in order to become flesh, but the Techno Blades can reboot the system and erase him for good. After a highly advanced army of Nindroids attacks the Sanctuary, Lloyd flees with his father into the wilderness of Ninjago, while the rest set off on a quest to turn off all power in Ninjago, so that they can erase the Digital Overlord once and for all.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons create a clone of Optimus Prime to lead the Autobots into a trap.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons discover the lost civilization of Atlantis in the depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron gains control over most of the Autobot forces.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead must protect Detroit from the Constructicons' plot to control the city's oil supply.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Elite Guard returns as an old enemy seeks revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prowl suspects Sentinel's success in capturing Decepticons may involve his old Cyber Ninja sensei.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The fugitive Wasp seeks refuge on Dinobot Island, finding an ally in Blackarachnia.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The kids join the Autobots on a mission to find a newly awakened Minicon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: In Antarctica, Starscream loses a Minicon to an unexpected thief.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead is trapped aboard the warship during a plot to kill Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A Dark Energon-infused Decepticon Warship becomes sentient and directly threatens humanity.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Team Prime splits off in a race to beat Megatron to the next four Iacon relics.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The second of the relic hunts takes Optimus Prime to the Antarctic.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime sends the Dinogots to a remote and mysterious island.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Time portals are opening up all over the world.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Where The Wild Smurfs Are: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He'd be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha's dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Word: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Flying Bed: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Chip Off The Old Smurf: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing For Gold: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Root Of Evil: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals
programme.desc: Brainy dons his safari hat and roams the forest to do good deeds for animals. He mostly gives advice to the creatures but balks when he can really save the life of a wildcat being hunted by Gargamel. Nat gives Brainy the courage to free the cat from Gargamel's trap.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Clockwork Smurfette: Clockwork Smurf is feeling so lonely that, out of compassion, Handy Smurf builds a female companion for him. The trouble is, Clockwork Smurfette does not know she's supposed to have eyes only for her mechanical counterpart, or that she should avoid Gargamel....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Christmas: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells: When Scruple, helper to the evil Gargamel, finds the Great Book of Spells in his master's cellar, he asks for the power to be the world's most powerful wizard. This means trouble for the poor little Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Snappy's Way
programme.desc: Did you know that if you catch a troll, he may grant you one wish? It just happens that Aloysius the Troll gets caught in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. Snappy Smurf sets him free and as a reward, gets to make all other Smurfs obey his every whim. Now this brings a lot of trouble to the Smurfs, as Smurflings, sometimes, ask for things that are not good for them... or anybody else.

programme.title: Don Smurfo
programme.desc: Everyone has their own dreams. That of Smurfette is to meet the legendary Don Smurfo, the dashing, witty, swashbuckling hero of many an engrossing tale. The Smurfs shrug at this infatuation. But when a real-life Don Smurfo appears in the village and Smurfette snubs them all in favor of the bragging stranger, they take the matter a little more seriously.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Christmas Blast
programme.desc: Santa Claus has made an announcement - he is retiring and has picked the perfect successor - "Robotnikclaus"! Sonic and his sister resolve to persuade Santa to return and set Christmas straight. When the two track down the Santa who made the announcement, they discover he is just a phony robot and the real Santa Claus is being held prisoner.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Big Griz, leader of a group of biker-bear rebels, mistakes Scratch and Grounder for Sonic and Tails, and teams up with S and G to attack the real Sonic and Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: An elderly, out of shape, overweight superhero keeps trying to help Sonic battle Dr. Robotnik, and keeps getting him in more jepordy. Sonic helps the old hero regain his self respect and they team up to battle Robotnik's latest scheme.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: After an accident, Scratch thinks he's an eagle and on the side of Sonic. In order to impress his his new lady love, Scratch assists Sonic in an excursion into Robotnik's Fortress to turn off a dangerous force field.

programme.title: Sonic Christmas Blast
programme.desc: Santa Claus has made an announcement - he is retiring and has picked the perfect successor - "Robotnikclaus"! Sonic and his sister resolve to persuade Santa to return and set Christmas straight. When the two track down the Santa who made the announcement, they discover he is just a phony robot and the real Santa Claus is being held prisoner.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Orangutango
programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.title: SONIC X Cruise Blues
programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are on a cruise when the Egg Fort appears inside a glacier. As Sonic faces his foes, he receives some help from Knuckles.

programme.title: SONIC X The Adventures of Knuckles and Hawk
programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: SONIC X The Dam Scam
programme.desc: When Sonic, Tails, Chris and the Egg Fort crash land on the Nature Continent after a fight, Tails and Chris protest against a dam while Sonic is caught in a battle against Decoe, Bocoe, E-65 and Eggman

programme.title: SONIC X Sonic's Scream Test
programme.desc: Chris' mother Lindsey is shooting a movie in an old castle and Sonic and his friends are there to visit as well. However, they begin to notice that something is amiss as ghostly figures begin to appear.

programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: In this outrageous spoof of "found footage" movies, young couple Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) and Kisha (Essence Atkins) have just moved into their dream house. As they settle in, they quickly find they're not alone. But it's not the house that's haunted, it's Malcolm's girlfriend!

programme.title: 12 Dogs Of Christmas 2: Great Puppy Race
programme.desc: The Doverville puppy orphanage is in danger of being shut down when an out-of-town business magnate announces his plans for renovation...

programme.title: Santa Claws
programme.desc: Tommy leaves his kittens out for Santa to take back to the North Pole, but after a major allergic reaction Santa can't deliver presents anymore, so the kittens have to deliver the rest of the presents to all the boys and girls.

programme.title: A Belgian Chocolate Christmas
programme.desc: A photographer takes her best friend's place at a Belgian culinary school at the holidays and connects with the chocolateir leading the class. As romance begins to bloom, the only problem is a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Saving Santaland
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a famous model and a farmer with a young daughter when she visits her childhood home. The town is in danger of losing their beloved Santaland festival, but miracles can happen with a little love, family, and faith.

programme.title: Burden Of Evil
programme.desc: (2012) Thriller with Michael Ironside. After the abduction of a senator's daughter, Detective Caitlyn Conner is called in to help. But it turns personal, as the same psychopath murdered her husband.

programme.title: Two Wrongs
programme.desc: A single mother must do the unthinkable to find her abducted daughter. Starring Gillian Zinser (2015)

programme.title: Two Wrongs
programme.desc: A single mother must do the unthinkable to find her abducted daughter. Starring Gillian Zinser (2015)

programme.title: Run To Me
programme.desc: An amateur triathlete falls under the spell of a controversial trainer who utilizes experimental hypnotherapy. Starring Claire Forlani (2016)

programme.title: Run To Me
programme.desc: An amateur triathlete falls under the spell of a controversial trainer who utilizes experimental hypnotherapy. Starring Claire Forlani (2016)

programme.title: Early Release
programme.desc: A suburban mother must protect her family from her former prison cellmate. Starring Kelli Williams (2017)

programme.title: Early Release
programme.desc: A suburban mother must protect her family from her former prison cellmate. Starring Kelli Williams (2017)

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programme.title: Dan In Real Life
programme.desc: In this down-to-earth dramedy, a widowed advice columnist and single father (Steve Carell) falls in love with a woman (Juliette Binoche) only to discover she is dating his brother.

programme.title: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: Ray is a fussy nine-year-old girl whose last nanny just ran out. When Ray's way-too-busy mom hires Molly to be Ray's new nanny, it's the perfect setup for both girls to change their ways and discover that sometimes your best friend can come in the form that you least expect!

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: The Family Man
programme.desc: Investment broker, Jack (Nicolas Cage), finds his fast-lane lifestyle turned upside down when he wakes up in an alternate suburban universe where his sports car and girlfriend have become a mini-van and wife. He soon finds himself at a crossroad between his high-power career and the woman he loves.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Three young women vacationing in Paris, find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of them is mistaken for a British heiress.

programme.title: A Puppy for Christmas
programme.desc: After adopting a cute puppy, Noelle's world is turned upside down when her boyfriend breaks up with her. After accepting an invitation to spend the holidays with a co-worker, she is surrounded by the Christmas cheer of a happy family and soon sparks begin to fly.

programme.title: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: The perfect Christmas story for all the family. Join eight-year old Julius as he embarks on a magical journey! Growing up in an orphanage, Julius has always been a bit of an outsider. However, one day he is wondrously transported to a frosty and enchanted world where, with the help of Herman the marzipan pig and Sophina the glass angel, he sets off to save Santa from the wicked hands of Crampus.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: A fugitive Secret Service agent must clear himself of murdering a colleague.

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Species: Species (1995)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: A professor comes across a series of numbers and realizes they predicted every disaster over the last 50 years

programme.title: The Mist
programme.desc: A storm unleashes bloodthirsty creatures on a small town, where a band of citizens hole up in a supermarket.
A gang of criminals and corrupt cops plan the murder of a police officer in order to pull off a heist.

programme.title: Dead Man Down
programme.desc: A man left for dead goes after the Eastern European mob boss who killed his wife and daughter.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior decorator and Christmas fanatic, Leslie Major, has the yearly task of decorating the lobby of the famed Chesterton Hotel. But one fateful day whilst working on a ladder to reach the top of the tree, she falls into the arms of Edmund James, the grandson of the hotel's owner. However, Edmund is all business and plans to put an end to the annual tradition. Can Leslie work her magic and teach him to love Christmas?

programme.title: A Miracle on Christmas Lake
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend on Christmas Eve, Bobby goes out onto the lake and makes a shocking discovery. When the land is bought, Bobby must rally the town to save it.

programme.title: Benji's Very Own Christmas Story
programme.desc: On a surprise visit to meet Kris Kringle, Benji and his friends are shocked to discover that he plans to take the night off on Christmas Eve!

programme.title: 3 Day Christmas
programme.desc: Martin Taylor has totally lost touch with his family. He has no clue who his teenage daughter's friends are, why his son only communicates with an electronic sign outside his bedroom door, or why his youngest child watches so much TV. Convinced the family needs to reconnect, Martin surprises the wife and kids with a little experiment-he locks them in their own home with no power, no heat, no running water, and absolutely no contact with the world outside! The sudden holiday staycation isn't what the Taylors had in mind for Christmas, but they'll have to team up to prove they can survive Dad's wacky mission and their wackier relatives. With a little planning and a whole lot of love, this just might turn into the best Taylor family Christmas yet!

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the charming city of York, and after the death of her mother, teenager Jules knows all she and her dad, David, really need for Christmas is love. With both struggling to cope with everyday life in the shadow of their loss, Jules, inspired by happy memories of her mum, decides to take matters into her own hands. Creating profiles for David on multiple online dating platforms without his knowledge, Jules sets out to find her dad a girlfriend and, for herself, someone with whom she can talk. But finding love is easier said than done as Jules discovers, when her plans begin to unravel with hilarious and unexpected consequences. A uniquely heartfelt festive rom-com, starring Jermey Piven (Serendipity, Entourage) and Joely Richardson (101 Dalmatians, The Patriot).

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: About Time meets The Time Travellers Wife in this coming-of-age sci-fi romance. If you could turn back time, could you win back the love of your life? When physics genius Stillman (Asa Butterfield) is dumped by his girlfriend Debbie (Sophie Turner), he creates a time machine and with his wing-man Evan (Skyler Gisondo) sets off to right every wrong. But some mistakes are too perfect to fix.

programme.title: Cold Skin
programme.desc: In the Antarctic circle, a young man is poised to take up the post of weather observer. But on shore he finds no trace of the man he has been sent to replace, just a deranged brute who has witnessed a horror he refuses to name.

programme.title: The Captor
programme.desc: Starring Ethan Hawke and Noomi Rapace and from the executive producer of BlacKkKlansman, this thrilling crime caper is based on the absurd but true story of the 1973 Stockholm bank heist. Outlaw Lars takes two workers hostage and demands his friend is released from prison, $1 million and a getaway car. As negotiations reach deadlock, hostage Bianca becomes strangely attracted to her captor.

programme.title: First Kill
programme.desc: No time off when it comes to crime! Starring Bruce Willis (Looper) and Gethin Anthony (Game of Thrones) this nail-biting, explosive thriller sees a holiday gone horribly wrong! In an attempt to reconnect with his son, Will (Haydn Christensen Jumper) takes his family to the cabin where he grew up. However, their trip takes a deadly turn when they witness the murder of a crooked police officer.

programme.title: The Triangle
programme.desc: In the summer of 2012, a group of four filmmakers receives a cryptic postcard from their friend, Nathaniel, who's been AWOL for more than three years. Despite the misgivings of one of the filmmakers, the group heads to Montana to answer Nathaniel's plea for help. With cameras rolling, the filmmakers set off to capture life inside what is either a harmless commune or something much more sinister

programme.title: Love, Romance and Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts?

programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: A perfumer's daughter works to meet the production deadline for her late father's company's latest scent which is missing one elusive ingredient. Starring Shantel VanSanten (2017)

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: This is an adaption of the much-loved coming over age title of four sisters trying to build their own identity whilst navigating life, gets a modern-day retailing. (2018)

programme.title: Guess Who
programme.desc: A sarcastic father (Bernie Mac) has plenty to say about his daughter wanting to marry a white boy (Ashton Kutcher).

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Reeling from a break-up, professional over-planner Gwen pitches in to help put the finishing touches on her best friend's wedding. But when she's teamed up with best man Josh, a free-spirited nature guide, she finds that pulling together this wedding might not be as easy as she thought.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: Rekindling Christmas
programme.desc: Drafted by the NFL Jesse left his college sweetheart behind. Now, years later, he's back with only one goal, to win Annika back.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Starring Mayim Bialik and Ryan McPartlin. Two strangers offer to share the last remaining room at a bed-and-breakfast when a snowstorm strands their flight in Montana on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Love by Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip with her godmother, a woman enlists her mechanic to be her fake boyfriend, but soon their fake relationship isn't so fake after all.

programme.title: Timeless Love
programme.desc: Megan seems to have the perfect life with a wonderful husband named Thomas and 2 adorable children. Then she finds herself awakening from a coma – and discovers she is not and has never been married. But when she meets Thomas for real, she seizes the chance to help him fall in love with her, again—for the first time.

programme.title: Tails of Christmas
programme.desc: A military veteran searches for purpose in his life after an injury cut his career short. He finds it in a kind woman who runs an animal shelter. As they work together to find animals homes during the Christmas adoption season, they develop feelings for each other, and help each other with the challenges each faces.

programme.title: A Model Christmas
programme.desc: Cali, an up-and-coming model, sees that there is more to life than just work when she and her driver, Jack, are forced to seek shelter from the winter weather at Jack's family home.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: The Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: Megan hunts for top Christmas hashtag to wow boss and crush at work.

programme.title: The Santa Con
programme.desc: Small-time con man Nick DeMarco is ordered to take a minimum-wage job.

programme.title: Steppin' Into the Holiday
programme.desc: Billy returns to his hometown and helps revive the town's Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: Pretty Little Stalker
programme.desc: A mother warns her popular son away from a new girlfriend, convinced she is dangerous to both of them.

programme.title: Killer in Suburbia
programme.desc: Gina and her daughter move to a new town, but when she is abducted, Gina must save her and trust no one.

programme.title: Hearts & Vines
programme.desc: A builder and decorator on a home renovation show end up quarantined during the holidays in the home they are renovating

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: An ancient mummified Incan priest is brought back to life after a botched museum heist.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A convicted murderer recants his confession on the grounds that he was mistaking psychic visions for reality.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: Wyatt Earp S01E17-20
programme.desc: In one of television's first adult Westerns, the famous marshal puts his life on the line to maintain order, first in Dodge City, Kan., then in Tombstone, Ariz.

programme.title: A Few Dollars for Django
programme.desc: Regan, a bounty hunter longing for a new life and perhaps a role as sheriff, is pulled back into action when a murder sets him on the trail of bank robbers. This pursuit thrusts him into a violent range war between farmers and cattlemen, forcing him to choose between his desire for peace and the harsh reality of his past.

programme.title: West of the Divide
programme.desc: Ted Hayden impersonates a wanted man and joins Gentry's gang only to learn later that Gentry was the one who killed his father. He saves Virginia Winters' dad's ranch from Gentry and also rescues his long-lost brother Spud.

programme.title: New Frontier (1939)
programme.desc: The state government plans to build a flood-control dam and condemns the property of the local farmers and ranchers, including The Three Mesquiteers. The state intends to compensate the land-owners fairly, but a crooked real-estate promoter complicates things. The ranchers, led by Stony Brooke ('John Wayne' (q)), Tucson Smith ('Ray Corrigan') and Rusty Joslin (Raymond Hatton) fight back against both the law and the crooks.

programme.title: The Godless Ones
programme.desc: An outlaw and a bounty hunter are searching for Mexican bandit Corbancho, who is running the El Paso area, and has also robbed the Bank of Tuscon of $400,000.

programme.title: JUST MY LUCK
programme.desc: Comedian Norman Wisdom stars as Norman, a young man who works in a jewellers. Across the road works Anne, a pretty girl with whom he is secretly in love. He is anxiously trying to obtain enough money to declare his love properly.

programme.title: Crooks Anonymous
programme.desc: Captain Dandy Forsdyke, phoney man-about-town and flourishing jewel thief, drives his girlfriend mad. Dandy cannot prevent himself from lifting such tempting objects as stray diamond rings and bulging wallets which are not at that moment being used.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: A Harley Street doctor sets off for Cornwall for a spot of fishing when he catches a beautiful mermaid. He brings her home and his wife is shocked to see a beautiful young woman with her legs wrapped in cloth. Will anyone discover the secret?

programme.title: Band Waggon
programme.desc: After being evicted from BBC Broadcasting House, Arthur (Arthur Askey) and his friend Stinker move to a castle where they come upon television equipment which they use to put on a show - not realising that it is in use by German agents.

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: How to steal a dog
programme.desc: Ji-so, a young girl who doesn't have a house because of her bankrupted dad. In order to get money to buy a house she plan to steals wealthy people's dogs to earn reward money when she returns them.

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Best Mistake 1 : The Movie
programme.desc: Kim Yeon Do (Lee Eun Jae) is a studious high school girl whose life is being made miserable by a boy from her past. Despite all of her efforts, she can't get peace as he won't leave her alone. So she hatches a plan. On her social media pages, she posts a picture of another boy, in the hope that this move will put an end to the irritation. But this move turns out to have unexpected consequences: It turns out that the boy in the picture is actually one of her schoolmates. Named Ji Hyun Ho (Kang Yul), he is a bit of a loose cannon. Although he is very popular, he dislikes studying - and prefers play. The rest of the school soon learns about the social media post, as news spreads fast in the classroom! This leads to a number of run-ins with ji Hyun Ho. But the more they get to know one another, the closer they get - causing yet further complications for a whole host of classmates!

programme.title: Idol
programme.desc: A car accident triggered everything. The secret is bound to connect two men's lives in a harrowing way.

programme.title: My Punch-Drunk Boxer
programme.desc: A former professional boxer who has been diagnosed with punch-drunk syndrome tries to revive his boxing career.

programme.title: Fourth Place
programme.desc: Junho a 11-year-old swimmer always records 4th place at all the swimming contests. His mom is more frustrated than himself in winning as she believes swimming is the only way for him to become successful. One day she manages to hire a personal coach who once was the most promising athlete on the national team. But he trains Junho the only way he knows how to use violence

programme.title: The Silenced
programme.desc: With her class mates' mysterious disappearances Ju-ran gets involved with her school's dark secrets.

programme.title: Last Signal
programme.desc: When a meteor shower unexpectedly ravages her hometown, Lera's father finds ingenious ways to communicate with her from aboard the space station Mira.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Edge of War
programme.desc: A series of incidents around the world lead to greater conflict, placing the superpowers at one another's throats. Armies march, bombs rain down, soldiers storm the beaches. One family is caught up in the conflict, can they survive as total war is declared and nuclear weapons are unleashed?

programme.title: The Last Boy on Earth
programme.desc: In a distant future, an enigmatic boy becomes the central figure in the search for a new hope.

programme.title: Welcome To Christmas
programme.desc: (2018) Festive romance with Eric Mabius. Developer Madison visits Christmas, Colorado, for a ski resort development plan but finds community and holiday magic. Will progress threaten the town's charm?

programme.title: Hearts Of Christmas
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Emilie Ullerup. A doctor planning a surprise Christmas party clashes with the hospital's new CFO, who is determined to trim the budget instead of the tree - until Cupid scrubs in.

programme.title: Holiday Hotline
programme.desc: (2023) Phone-omenal romance with Emily Tennant. There's love on the line when a woman working at a switchboard connects with a charming anonymous caller - but she doesn't realise they've already met.

programme.title: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: (2016) Romance starring Jaime King. Two Christmas haters agree to navigate the season together - but with the magic of the season beginning to take hold, will love also be on the cards?

programme.title: Christmas By Design
programme.desc: (2023) Festive rom com with Rebecca Dalton. Reluctantly in her hometown for Christmas, can NYC fashion designer Charlotte discover what's really important in life with the help of a charming local?

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Coming home in the dark
programme.desc: A family's outing descends into terror when teacher Alan Hoaganraad, his wife Jill and stepsons Maika and Jordon explore an isolated coastline. An unexpected meeting with a pair of drifters thrusts the family into a nightmare when they find themselves captured.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love & freedom.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: Casualties Of War
programme.desc: From visionary director Brian De Palma, war is war, but murder is murder. Michael J. Fox and Sean Penn star in this action-packed Vietnam war saga in which one soldier thought he had a license to kill and another dared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Celebrated and adored by millions, she was the Queen of people's hearts, yet the bittersweet story of the last man to truly capture hers has never before. In a story that until now has remained untold, Diana introduces a time in the Princess's life that was important in shaping her final years...

programme.title: Emperor
programme.desc: EMPEROR is a gripping tale of love and honour forged between fierce enemies of war, a story inspired by true events, of the bold and secret moves that won peace in the shadows of postwar Japan.

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: Fireflies in the Garden
programme.desc: The Taylor family is devastated by an accident that takes place on the day their matriarch is due to graduate from college.

programme.title: Iron Fury

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: When ex-Government agent Luke Wright exposes the Russian mafia for rigging an illegal fight, they seek revenge on his family and threaten to kill anyone close to him.
